root: ^Valerie barely had time to remove her coat that someone was already ringing at the door
^There a couple was standing, probably the meeting that Valentine was supposed to have
^Valentine is busy today so I hope you don't mind me taking his place, please come inside
^Valerie led them in the bedroom and slowly removing her shirt, sat on the bed
^From what I understand you've looking for couple toys, why don't I let you sample some of the ones we sell?
^As the couple both removed their clothes, Valerie signed them to come closer
^The woman sat on the bed as Valerie passed a hand around her back, but as her hand reached a vibrator, she noticed uncertainty in the eyes of the girl
^Or maybe you would like some time to think a bit more?
^Y-yes, maybe it's just going a bit fast
^That's not a problem my dear, if you change your mind just give us another call
^The couple both apologized and left the house
^Sounds like my evening plans got shortened, if they feel like it they will probably contact us back in a few days
^You reached the end of this jam game, maybe things will go better as packages are more swiflty delivered, you'll now be redirected to the main menu
